creator: darren.henderson@gmail.com
text:
man 5 newsyslog.d when discussing the size option the text states "...the log
file will be trimmed as described above.  If this field contains an asterisk(`*'), the log file will not be trimmed based on size."

Nothing prior to that statement addresses trimming so it's unclear as to what the asterisk is meant to do. 

I suspect it was meant to be "rotated" rather than "trimmed". This would read more clearlym, "...the log file will be rotated.  If this field contains an asterisk (`*'), the log file will not be rotated based on size."
